meaning: n.坏人,(尤指电影中之)恶人
examples: Narcissa may be a baddie, but she is a good mother.
If there is no baddie in the world, then there is no good lawyer.
A baddie-turned-goodie, she tries to drown Bond, then slowly surrenders to his generic star power.
But the Bugatti Veyron placed on the baddie list, as did two Bentleys.
James Coburn is wasted as an administrative baddie.
